parsed_output.justification: Hunter's behavior is the most suspicious among the players. He attempts to lead the narrative using vague 'auditory' evidence to assign roles to others and makes a weak claim to be the Robber, stating he 'stole his card' without specifying the role of the card he allegedly stole. His erratic behavior, including suggesting he vote for himself, further suggests he may be bluffing to hide his identity as a Werewolf or to mimic the Tanner.
